Off Calendar May-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. YOSI YAHOUDAI OF THE JAVAHERI & YAHOUDAI, TEL. NO. 1-310-407-0766 appearing for the plaintiff by telephone appearance;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT LOTUS HOSPITALITY II, INC.'S Motion To Transfer Venue To San Mateo County Superior Court is
Granted. This case is transferred to San Mateo County. No opposition filed. Plaintiff Ling Titone must pay all transfer fees. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
